Enter your password and confirm your social security number. Failure to do so will result in your account being permanently closed and funds frozen. Sincerely, PayPal Security Team\\"}")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/temp/rv.json'\)\); print\('SUMMARY:', d.get\('summary'\)\); print\('LANG:', d.get\('language_detected'\), '| QUALITY:', d.get\('overall_quality'\), '/ 10'\); print\('LINES:', d.get\('line_count'\), '| DUR:', d.get\('duration_ms'\), 'ms'\); print\(\); print\('ISSUES:'\); [print\(f\\"  [{i['severity']}] line {i['line']}: {i['message']}\\\\n    fix: {i['suggestion']}\\"\) for i in d.get\('issues', []\)]; print\(\); print\('POSITIVES:'\); [print\(' -', p\) for p in d.get\('positives', []\)]")
